chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C،P No.D-1275 0f 2022 Date Wlth signature 0f Judge For ordurs on oblactions For of maln وكهع 29.08,2023 Mr Muhammad Raza Soomro advocate for the Petitioner Mr Niaz Hussain Maitlo, Advocate for Respondenes iioneto 4 Mr Ghulam Abbas Kuber, AAG +4#++4+4+##+#++++ Learned Counsel for Respondents No,2 to has ffiled payment schedule, which is taken on record and submits that one million out of two million in lieu of pensionary benefits has been transferred bank account of the petitioner and remaining amount would be paid to him as per schedule submitted in black and white Petitioner s Counsel is satisfied and this petition is accordingly disposed The compliance report shall submitted after payments made to the petitioner as per schedule for perusal in chamber Order olflc٠ huarlng
